name: Grade 11 Geography — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 11 pathway for advanced geographic research, spatial data, globalization, and environmental systems. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 11 knowledge and transferable skills in advanced geographic research, spatial data, globalization, and environmental systems.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about advanced geographic research, spatial data, globalization, and environmental systems and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
